mentals.text: MIND. ► All day long, lively, excited, [1] , [3] . ► Extremely exalted, [1] . ► Occasionally excessive mirth, [1] . ► He often laughs, without moderation, at a trifle (after thirty-eight days), [3] . ► The mood changes for the better, after supper; headache and pain at the stomach ceasing at the same time, [3] . ► Earnest mood, [1] . ► Very weeping mood, with thoughts of death, [1] . ► Sad, almost weeping mood, towards evening (second day), [3] . ► Great depression of spirits (with the abdominal complaints), [15] . [10.] ► Cloudy weather makes her very sad, [1] . ► Sad, low-spirited, apprehensive of evil, accompanied by chilliness, in the forenoon, [3] . ► The whole morning, striking gloomy humor, [15] . ► Kind of sadness not usual with me; no inclination to go out, [8] . ► Very hypochondriacal, [12] . ► Morose, and full of grief, [1] . ► The recollection of past disagreeable occurrences torments him, [1] . ► Sighing, [7] . ► Gloomy and uneasy mood (second day), [7] . ► She is anxious on account of her illness, [1] . [20.] ► For many afternoons she is seized with a weakness and anxiety; she knows not how to comfort herself, what to do with herself; this state leaves her towards evening, [1] . ► About 7 P.M., a sort of anxiety possessed me, which lasted about an hour, and then went off again, [16] . ► At night, attack of great anxiety, as if she had to die, accompanied by cold sweat, audible palpitation of the heart, and involuntary lachrymation; she was unable to move her eyes or to speak, accompanied by audible heavy breathing, and trembling of the hands (after nineteenth day), [1] . ► Every afternoon, between five and six o'clock, she is seized with anguish, as if she had committed the greatest crime; towards evening the anguish passes off, [1] . ► Great oppression of the heart; he knows not how to quiet himself, [1] . ► Very easily frightened, [1] . ► After the fever, very ill-humored and irritable; felt better after a glass of "bishop," [12] . ► Very unamiable, irritated, peevish; she answers reluctantly (second day of her courses), [3] . ► Peevishness early in the morning, [1] . ► Ill-humor, peevishness, sometimes accompanied by headache, in the forenoon, [3] . [30.] ► Peevish and angry, [1] . ► Peevish, angry, scolding, in the evening (sixth day), [3] . ► Considerable ill-humor and dissatisfied feeling, [15] . ► She found fault with everything, [1] . ► She could not bear any noise, [1] . ► The child is extremely obstinate, [4] . ► Bears no contradiction, [1] . ► She has rest nowhere, and succeeds in nothing (fourth day), [3] . ► At night, low spirits, and sometimes considerable excitement, [17] . ► He does not seem to be in his senses, [1] . [40.] ► Head very thoughtless, [1] . ► She finds it hard to arrange her ideas, [1] . ► He speaks incorrectly; speaks wrong without wishing it; uses one word for another in speaking, [1] . ► He easily uses wrong letters and figures in writing or ciphering (ninth day), [1] . ► Very forgetful, and headache when reflecting, [3] . ► Very forgetful; absent; cannot recollect (ninth day), [1] . ► Very absent; when telling a story he easily loses his train of thoughts, and hits upon thoughts and expression which he did not wish to employ (eighth day), [1] . ► Absence of mind, accompanied by anxiety; when speaking, he is at a loss to finish his speech, [1] .

head.text: HEAD. ► Confusion of head (in one-quarter hour), [15] . [50.] ► Soon after taking, confusion and weight of the head, [19] . ► Emptiness and confusion of the head (after one-quarter hour), [1] . ► Stupefaction of the head, [7] . ► Headache as before, especially a sensation as after having been drunk (" Katzenjammer"), [8] . ► Vertigo, as from intoxication, after sitting still for some time (towards evening), [1] . ► Vertigo, [8] , [20] . ► Vertigo at night and early in the morning (after two days), [1] . ► Vertigo at night; everything turned with her; she had to sit up in bed, [1] . ► Frequent vertigo, early in the morning after rising; it continues the whole day, and is worse toward evening; he feels as if things turned with him in a circle, also at night on moving his head, [3] . ► Vertigo, with nausea, early in the morning; in walking it soon passes of (fourth day), [3] . [60.] ► Early in the morning, vertigo, with flickering before the eyes; she has to sit down, [1] . ► Vertigo and cold sweat, such as usually accompany a fainting fit, [12] . ► Vertigo, and trembling of the feet, so that he has to hold himself in order not to fall, for several days (after three days), [3] . ► Vertigo, with headache (one hour after taking), [3] . ► Upon turning with the body the head immediately feels dizzy, [1] . ► Giddiness, nausea, and want of appetite ever since the dawn of day, [1] . ► Headache (in half hour), [15] . ► Severe headache, [10] . ► Slight headache, which did not last long, [16] . ► In afternoon, violent headache, [11] . [70.] ► In evening, slight headache, [11] . ► Headache after dinner (fifth day), [3] . ► Headache, early in bed, with nausea, which rises as high up as the throat; she feels an inclination to vomit; the symptom passes off after two or three hours, [1] . ► Headache and pain at the stomach, accompanied by ill-humor, the whole day (after three days), [3] . ► In the morning, noticed a slight headache, combined with nausea, which, however, as usual, went off as soon as I took my pipe in my mouth, [16] . ► Headache, with heaviness of the forehead, early in the morning; worse in the afternoon (eighth day), [3] . ► Tensive feeling in brain, especially on right side, [20] . ► Head heavy and full, [20] . ► Afternoon, after drinking coffee, congestion to head, [12] . ► Towards evening, the rush of blood was greater, [12] . [80.] ► Rush of blood to the head at night, and heat in the face on waking, [1] . ► Feeling of lightness in head , [14] . ► His head seems very heavy, [1] . ► Pressure over the whole head after having got heated (after ten days), [1] . ► Headache, now here, now there, in the brain; a pressure, with sticking over one eyebrow, [1] . ► Boring and lancinating pain in the head at night, [1] . ► Drawing and tearing in the whole head, early after rising, and during the whole day (twenty-third day), [3] . ► Clawing pain in the head, [1] . ► Sticking headache the whole day, [1] . ► Headache, resembling a knocking or hacking with a sharp instrument; pain prevented her from moving, she had to lie still, [1] . [90.] ► Pain, as from ulceration, in moving the head and in pressing upon it, especially in the occiput, at one of the glands of that region, for some time, [3] . ► Headache, as if water or something else were in his head, [1] . ► Sense of looseness of the brain, [1] . ► The head easily gets cold, [1] . ► Eruptions upon the forehead resembling little boils, [1] . ► Pimples and vesicles on the forehead, [1] . ► Pimples on the forehead, and the tip of the nose, [7] . ► Headache in forehead, [15] . ► Confusion and heaviness in forehead, [20] . ► Burning pains in sinciput, [12] . [100.] ► Heat and pressure in sinciput, [15] . ► Pressive sense of fulness in the forehead , as from the vapor of coal, [1] . ► *Pressive fulness in the forehead and vertex, as if the head would burst there , [1] . ► On stooping, there is tension in the nape of the neck; in front, the head threatens to burst with pain, [1] . ► *Headache, beating in the forehead as if it would burst , [1] . ► *Heaviness and beating in the forehead, after dinner , [3] . ► For several mornings she is roused from her slumber by a drawing pain of the periosteum of the forehead; the pain passes off after rising, [1] . ► Uproar behind the right frontal eminence, as if everything would come out there (second day), [3] . ► Boring stitches behind the right frontal eminence, deep in the brain, during dinner (second day), [1] . ► Throbbing headache in left frontal region, [20] . [110.] ► Pricklings over the right eye, [7] . ► Stitches over the left eye, so violent that they often cause the eyes to contract, after dinner (fourth day), [6] . ► Tearing in the temples, early, and in the evenings, [3] . ► Painful throbbing and beating in the temple, in the left side of the head, and the left side of the occiput, sometimes with yawning, [3] . ► Tearing in the right temple, during dinner, [1] . ► Stitches in the left temple, as with a blunt instrument, [7] . ► Stitches in the left temple, increased by chewing, [1] . ► Headache in vertex, [8] . ► Pressure at the top of the head, half an hour (after six days), [3] . ► Feeling of coldness in the course of the longitudinal sinus (in half hour), [14] . [120.] ► The right side of her head seems to be heavier than the left; the head feels as if it would fall over on that side (first day), [3] . ► On moving his head, there is a sensation as of the brain falling to and fro, towards the side where he stoops, sometimes with stinging pains, a symptom which gives him no rest, even at night, for several weeks in succession, [3] . ► Stitches here and there in the head, deep in the brain, especially in the right side; they pass off in the open air (fourth to forty-second day), [3] . ► Heaviness in the left side of the head, growing worse in bed (forty-sixth day), [3] . ► Tearing behind the left ear, as far as the vertex, with a sensation as if the head were cleft, [3] . ► Itching of the head, accompanied by great sensitiveness of the integuments of the head when scratching (tenth day), [3] . ► Violent itching of the hairy scalp, especially of the occiput, [1] . ► Sense as if the hairs would stand upon end, with crawling over the whole head, and a feeling of coldness there, after coming out of the open air and entering the room, [3] . ► The hair is painful when touched, [1] . ► The scalp and the hairs are intensely painful when the hand is moved along them; this movement made him shudder (first evening), [1] .
Pulsating forehead; better, pressure and in warm room. Shocks through head

Vertigo, on reading in a sitting posture, in the morning or in the evening; sometimes with nausea. Obstinate headache. Headache with nausea. The headache often appears in the evening, after walking in the open air, or in the morning, or after a meal. Pain, as of ulceration in the head, chiefly on moving the head, or on pressing it. Hammering, pressure, and beatings in the head, with sensation as if its contents were going to start through the forehead, or the head were on the point of bursting; after eating and while walking in the open air; > from external pressure and in the warm room; heaviness and beating in the forehead after dinner. Shootings at the base of the brain. Headache, as if from carbonic acid gas. Sensation as if the brain moved loosely in the skull. Soreness of the scalp and of the hair. Itching in the head. Falling off of the hair.

Heaviness and beating in forehead after dinner. Pressing fulness in forehead as from vapor of coal. Sensation as if all was to be pressed out at forehead. Sense of oppressive fulness, pushing as if forehead would burst. Severe pain in forehead. θ Undeveloped measles. Pulsating, beating and pressing in forehead, as if it would burst ; worse after eating ; while walking in open air ; better from pressure ; in warm room. Headache, thrusts in forehead, as if it would burst. Tearing : in whole head ; in temples ; back of left ear, ascending to vertex. Boring, stitching headache at night. Stitches in various parts of head. Sensation of looseness of brain ; as if the brain fell to side towards which he leaned. Congestive and menstrual headache. When stooping, sensation as if blood was accumulating. Headache : in morning in bed, with nausea and risings in throat, as if to vomit ; in morning, but < in afternoon. Pain on head resembling hammering or hacking with a flat instrument. Drawing pain in periosteum of forehead, wakens from sleep in morning, passes off after rising. Severe itching of scalp, especially on occiput. Sensation as if hair would stand on end, with crawling and cold feeling on head, after coming into room from open air. Scalp, even hair, painful to touch.

eyes.text: EYES. [130.] ► The eyes are weak; the child winks continually, [4] . ► Burning of the eyes the whole day, especially early on waking, with intolerance of light, and in the evening on lying down, [3] . ► The eyes are inflamed and dim, [1] . ► The right eye is a little inflamed and dim, [7] . ► Pressure in the eyes, [7] . ► Pressure and cutting in the eyes (fourth day), [1] . ► Pressure and fine stitches in the eyes (second day), [1] . ► Prickings and pressure in the eyes, [7] . ► Biting in the eyes, and itching of the borders of the lids, [1] . ► Itching and biting in the eyes, which pass off by rubbing (early in the morning), (first fourth, and twelfth days), [3] . [140.] ► A sty on the right upper lid becomes inflamed, with a sensation of tension (second day), [1] . ► Very great twitching in external canthus of right eye, like live blood, and visible in mirror; the eye was for two hours as if covered by a veil, [10] . ► Inflammation of the inner canthus of the right eye, without pain (twenty-sixth day), [1] . ► Pressure upon the eyelids on waking up, and when he is about falling asleep; he cannot open them, although he is internally awake, [1] . ► The eyes are agglutinated, early in the morning, [1] . ► The eyes are agglutinated, early in the morning, after sound sleep; it takes her a long time to open them, [3] . ► The eyes are agglutinated in the morning; they run in daytime, [7] . ► When reading, his eyes run, [1] . ► Watery eye; the white of the eye is full of red veins, as in an incipient inflammation of the eye, [1] . ► The right eye waters, and the vessels of the cornea are distinctly visible, [7] . [150.] ► Copious lachrymation, especially of the right eye, as well in the open air as in the room, [3] . ► Pupils alternately dilated and contracted, [20] . ► Indistinct vision, [8] . ► Flickering before eyes, [19] . ► When sneezing, white stars sparkle before his eyes, [3] . ► Sparks before her eyes upon waking at night, [1] . ► A large black spot hovers before the eye after she has been sewing, [1] . ► On looking at a distance, and also on accommodating for near vision, objects seem doubled, [3] .
Burning of eyes with aversion to light. Eye-strain (Nat mur). Asthenopia. Sore canthi

Burning in the eyes, principally in the evening, or in the morning, with photophobia. Sensation of cold in the eyes. Hordeolum. Nocturnal agglutination of the eyelids. Dry excretion in the eyelids. Affections from over-straining the eyes. Muscæ volitantes. Eyes weak and watery after reading or using them at fine work. Yellow spots before the eyes on looking at white objects. Inability to move the eyes. Confused sight, with sparks before the eyes. Double vision. Myopia. Cataract. Black spots and bright bands before the eyes. Weeping.

Double vision. Aversion to light, with burning in eyes. Optical illusions, particularly in white or bright colors. Sparks before eyes at night. θ Headache. Large black spot floats before eyes after sewing. Eyes weak and watery, especially after reading ; muscular asthenopia ; affections from overstraining eyes. Yellow spots on looking at white objects. Cataract of right eye. Burning in eyes all day. Inflammation of eyes ; vision obscured. Eyes bloodshot, with lachrymation. Pressure on eyelids so that he cannot open them, even though internally awake. Pressure with cutting or stitching in eyes. Smarting in eyes and itching on margin of lids. Stye on right upper eyelid, with tension.

ears.text: EARS. ► Hard swelling of the parotid glands, [1] . ► Twitches and tension around the left ear, in the cheek-bone and in the temples, with swelling of the cervical glands, [1] . [160.] ► Tearing below and behind the ears (made worse by moving the head), sometimes extending as far as the vertex, the occiput, and the nape of the neck, also the shoulder (after dinner), [3] . ► Tension behind the right ear, [3] . ► Twitches and pinching in the internal ear, [1] . ► Frequent and painful stitches in the right ear, [3] . ► In evening, transient pinching in right ear, as has happened several times before these last days, [15] . ► Stitches in the left ear (second day), [1] . ► Throbbing in the left ear, at night, when lying upon it; on turning to the other side, the symptom disappears (sixth day), [3] . ► Early in the morning, itching over the ears, which spreads over the whole body (third day), [1] . ► Crawling and burrowing in the left ear, which afterwards extends to the lower jaw (tenth day), [3] . ► Painful sensitiveness of the deaf ear in consequence of a loud sound; this caused her to tremble over the whole body, [1] . [170.] ► Diminished hearing, [3] . ► A report in the ears as of a distant shot, five or six times in the course of an hour, [1] . ► Roaring before the left ear, [3] . ► At night, roaring in the left ear (second day), [1] . ► Illusion of hearing; he imagines he hears the ringing of bells, [3] . ► Every day, after midnight, rushing in the (right) ear, when resting upon it in bed, [1] . ► Buzzing before the ears , as if the hearing were dull, and as if something were lying before the ears (after seventeen days), [1] .
Hardness of hearing. Shocks through ears, eyes, and nose, when gnashing teeth

Buzzing in the ears, particularly at night. Roaring and tingling in the ears. Hardness of hearing, with suppuration and itching of the ears. Hard swelling of the glands of the neck, and of the parotid glands.

Painful sensitiveness of dull ear to loud noise. Dull sense of hearing. Humming and buzzing before ears. Hard hearing ; ear itches and discharges pus. Indistinct hearing. Itching above ears, spreads over whole body. Hard swelling of right parotid gland. θ Scarlatina.

nose.text: NOSE. ► Pimple upon the tip of the nose, [1] . ► Furunculus on the tip of the nose, [1] . ► Pustule on the side of the nose, [1] . [180.] ► On the septum of the nose a vesicle, in forepart, [3] . ► *An Acrid fluid runs from the nose , [1] . ► Water drops out of the nose, without a cold, [3] . ► *When stooping, water runs from the nose , [1] . ► During the catamenia, acrid water, which excites a burning sensation upon upper lip, is constantly running out of her nose (forty-third day), [3] . ► On blowing the nose, early in the morning, pus drops out at one of the nostrils (fifth day), [1] . ► Blowing bloody mucus out of the nose , frequently, [1] . ► On blowing the nose, blood comes out at the left nostril (second day), [3] . ►► *Bleeding at the nose (eighth day), [1] . ► Bleeding at the nose, after dinner (second day), [1] . [190.] ► Frequent sneezing, early in the morning, when in bed , [1] . ► Frequent violent sneezing (fifth day), [3] . ► *Obstruction of the nose , [7] . ► The nose is very much obstructed, without any cold , [1] . ► *At night the nose was so obstructed, that she was not able to breathe, except through her mouth (after four days), [1] . ► After having had a sound nap in the forenoon, she wakes up at 1 o'clock with a sense of anxiety, as if she were choking; this was on account of the nose being quite obstructed, and her not being able to take breath, except with an open mouth, so that the chest was painful in consequence of the difficult breathing (after twelve days), [1] . ► Cold, with rattling in the nose, accompanied by obstruction of the nose, and roughness of voice, [3] . ► Stuffed cold in the head for a week, causing confusion of the head, [10] . ► Cold, with obstruction of the left nostril, [3] . ► *Dry coryza, especially at night, without the slightest air passing through the nose , [1] . [200.] ► Dry coryza and obstruction of the nose, when lying in bed, in the evening and at night, [1] . ► *Fluent coryza (fourth day), [1] . ► Violent fluent coryza, with tearing in the left cheek, [3] . ► Violent fluent coryza, with cough, [1] . ► Coryza, [15] . ► Great coryza, [15] . ► Unusually severe coryza, [15] . ► Uncommonly violent coryza, which lasts with an unusual obstinacy, [15] . ► Tearing in the left nostril, and simultaneously in the bone of the left elbow, extending towards the hand [3] . ► Slight twitching in the left side of the nose, which seems to draw up the wing of the nose, [1] . [210.] ► *When stooping, sensation in the tip of the nose as if the blood, were accumulating there , [3] . ► Upon strongly breathing through the nose, this organ feels painful, [1] . ► Swelling, sensation of soreness and itching in the right nostril, with a crawling in the nose, as if from constant catarrh, the nose runs (after three days), [1] . ► Left ala nasi internally swollen and tender, [15] . ► Dryness of nose and lips, [15] . ► Smell like a profuse sour perspiration, [15] .

Discharge of sharp, burning water. Stoppage at night, with long-continued coryza. Cannot breathe through nose. Snuffles of children. Epistaxis after washing and after eating. Ozæna, blows bloody mucus from nose. Tip of nose congested

Heaviness in the extremity of the nose on stooping, as if from congestion of blood. Itching and purulent pimples in the nose. Furunculus at the extremity of the nose. Swelling, sensation of excoriation and painful sensibility of the nostrils. Discharge of sharp, burning water from the nose. Discharge of pus from the nose. Excretion of sanguineous mucus. Bleeding of the nose, particularly in the morning on washing, or after a meal. Obstinate dryness of the nose. Obstinate coryza. Dry coryza and stoppage of the nose, chiefly at night, with danger of suffocation. With long-continued coryza, he can only breathe through the mouth.

Nosebleed ; dry coryza, especially at night, without slightest air passing through ; redness of tip of nose, when stooping. Nosebleed ; severe pain as if brain was forcing itself out just above nose. Nosebleed : when washing face or hands in morning nose bleeds from left nostril ; from right several days in succession, weakening boy. θ Undeveloped measles. When stooping, blood rushes to tip of nose. Bloody mucus blown from nose frequently. θ Ozæna. Burning water runs from nose ; < when stooping. Stoppage, mostly at night ; must breathe through mouth, with long-lasting coryza. θ Scarlatina. Child's nose stopped up, starts from sleep ; rattling of phlegm in trachea. Coryza in hysterical females, in feeble or aged people. Pustules on nose.

face.text: FACE. ► Wretched look, [4] . ► Pale, wretched appearance, [15] . ► Paleness of the face, with nausea, and moral and physical weariness, [1] . ► Pale, bloated face, for a long time (after thirty days), [3] . [220.] ► Pale face, accompanied by headache, pain at the stomach and ill-humor (fourth day), [3] . ► Increased number of pimples on face, [15] . ► Heat in the face, during mental exertions , [1] . ► Heat in the face, during and after dinner , [1] . ► Heat in the head and face, with red cheeks, [3] . ► Sense as of stretching in the face; she has to rub her eyes and her face, as if she were sleepy, [3] . ► Tension of the skin of the face (the nose and both lips), as if the face were swollen, early in the morning on waking, [1] . ► Contraction of the skin of the forehead and face, [1] . ► Violent pain in the face on the right side, [1] . ► Painful tension and tearing in the right side of the face (second day), [3] . [230.] ► Hard swelling of the cheek, as well as the glands of the ear and neck, [1] . ► White, herpes-like spots of the size of a small pea, which continually exfoliate (upon the cheek), [1] . ► Boils upon the cheek and around the ear, [1] . ► Small boils and indurations, discharging water and blood, upon the cheek, at the corners of the mouth, and on the chin, [3] . ► Pustules upon the forehead, temple, cheek, and chin, [3] . ► Pustules upon the cheeks, during the menses, [3] . ► Drawing pain in the cheek bones, [1] . ► Pimple on left cheek, near ear, not painful unless pressed, [10] . ► Redness of left cheek, [3] . ► Pressive pain in the zygoma, [1] . [240.] ► Burning vesicles on the vermilion border of both lips, [3] . ► The lips are constantly dry, and stick together (fifteenth day), [3] . ► Itching of the mouth; both lips were itching, [1] . ► Vesicles at the right corner of the mouth and on the upper lip, [3] . ► Pimple on the lower lip, with burning pain, [1] . ► Eruption at the mouth, [1] . ► Herpes-like scaly eruption around the mouth, [1] . ► Miliary eruption around the chin, without sensation, [1] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Am-c.
Tetters around mouth. Boils and pustules, during menses. Corners of mouth sore, cracked, and burn

Face pale and bloated, with nausea and fatigue of body and mind. Sickly complexion. Heat in the face during intellectual labour. Tension and acute dragging pains, with shootings in the right side of the face. Tightness in the skin of the face, as if the face were swollen. Hard swelling of the (r.) parotid gland. Distortion of the features. Eruptions on the face, with itching. Furunculi on the cheeks. Ephelides. Tetter-like eruptions, with desquamation of the skin, on the cheeks, round the mouth, and on the chin. Lips dry, cracked, burning, and bleeding. The corners of the mouth and lips are sore, cracked, and burn. Painful swelling of the sub-maxillary glands. Itching eruptions, with soreness of the sub-maxillary glands.

Heat in face : during mental exertion ; during and after dinner. Heat in face, with red cheeks. Redness of left cheek. Pale face, bloated. Hard swelling of cheek, also of parotid and cervical glands. Pustulous eruption on forehead, cheeks and chin. Small boils and indurations, emitting water and blood on cheek, at corner of mouth and on chin. Freckles. Herpetic eruption around mouth. Itching eruption on lips. Upper lip pains, as if cracked. Lower lip cracked in middle, bleeding and burning. Painful burning blister on inside of lower lip. Blueness of lips.

throat.text: THROAT. ► *Burning in the throat, down the sophagus , as from alcohol, [3] . ► Soreness in the throat, [1] . ► Sore throat towards evening, [7] . ► Bad sore throat, like stinging and drawing, or tearing, more painful when speaking (third day), [1] . ► Sore throat, like a scraping, [1] . ► *Roughness and scraping in the throat , [3] . ► Pressure in the throat, with external swelling on both sides, [1] . ► Dryness in the throat, [11] . ► Dryness of the throat and mouth, [1] . [350.] ► On waking early in the morning, dryness of the throat and mouth, with thirst, [3] . ► Afternoons and evenings, dryness in the throat and mouth, with thirst, [3] . ► Burning in the fauces and sophagus, [15] . ► Pain in the throat during deglutition, as if the right tonsil were swollen , [1] . ► Swelling of the tonsils, with difficult deglutition, especially early in the morning and in the evening, [1] . ► Sensation as if something were sticking in her throat, by which swallowing is made difficult, accompanied by a sensation of choking pressure (early, and in the evening), [7] , [3] . ► She feels as if something were sticking in her throat, on the right side, making deglutition difficult (after six minutes), [1] . ► In afternoon and towards evening, aching and shooting in the thyroid gland, which had been swollen and painless for years, [15] .

stomach.text: STOMACH. ► Increase of hunger and appetite (first and second days), [3] . ► Very violent hunger and appetite (after eighteen days), [1] . [360.] ► Rabid hunger (after two hours), [1] . ► Increased appetite at dinner; nevertheless, she is immediately satiated after eating little (fourth and sixth days), [3] . ► Was very hungry, but had little appetite, [12] . ► No desire for meat or boiled things; she only desires bread and cold food, for several days, during the catamenia, [3] . ► Little hunger and appetite, although he relishes his meal (second and eighth days), [3] . ► No appetite, [12] . ► Want of appetite early in the morning, [1] . ► Milk becomes distasteful to her, [1] . ► She cannot eat her dinner without drinking (after ten days), [1] . ► No appetite, but continual thirst, [1] . [370.] ► Considerable thirst, [16] . ► Much thirst for beer (lasting a week), [14] . ► Continual thirst, [1] . ► Thirst continued the whole afternoon, [3] . ► Constant absence of thirst during the time of proving, [3] . ► Disposition to eructate, [15] . ► Eructation, [15] . ► Great eructation, [15] . ► Eructation in an hour, [15] . ► Constant eructations, [1] . [380.] ► Frequent but suppressed eructations , [1] . ► A good deal of empty eructations , especially the first day, [1] . ► Frequent risings of air, in the evening and after dinner (fifth day), [3] . ► Sour eructations, [1] . ► After taking milk, sour eructations (in four hours), [15] . ► Eructations tasting of the food, [1] . ► Eructations tasting of the food, during and after supper (tenth day), [3] . ► Feverish chilliness early in the morning, succeeded by hiccough (second day), [3] . ► Nausea (in half hour), [15] . ► On taking, nausea, [14] . [390.] ► Nausea, with flatulent disturbance, [6] . ► Nausea and coated tongue, early in the morning (after eight days), [1] . ► Attacks of nausea the whole night so that she was unable to sleep (after eight hours), [1] . ► Inclination to vomit, but without actually vomiting , [2] . ► Sense of nausea and lassitude during and after dinner (during the catamenia), (ninth day), [3] . ► Qualmishness, early after rising, until the afternoon, accompanied by chilliness in the whole body; when this symptom appears, she vomits sour water during the catamenia (after fifty-five days), [3] . ► Qualmishness of the stomach unto vomiting, when walking (fourth day), [3] . ► Qualmishness after eating , [1] . ► Qualmishness and inclination to vomit, every day, immediately after dinner, for a whole hour, [1] . ► After eating, she finds talking difficult, [1] . [400.] ► Rumbling in stomach, [8] . ► Pain at the stomach, with loathing of the supper while the person is taking it (eighth day), [3] . ► Pain in the stomach, with disposition to watery risings (sixth day), [3] . ► Burning in the region of the stomach, [1] . ► Burning heat, first at the stomach, then also in the bowels (shortly after taking), [3] , [7] . ► Heat at the stomach, which extends into the intestines, as from drinking strong wine (after a quarter of an hour), [1] . ► Feeling of coldness in the region of the stomach, [1] . ► Sensation as if the stomach were overloaded, until three hours after a meal , [1] . ► The stomach seems full, trembling (during the catamenia), [3] . ► *The clothes press upon the stomach , [1] . [410.] ► Sense of emptiness at the stomach, [7] . ► Pinching, rumbling, and gurgling in the stomach, [1] . ► Aching in stomach (in half hour), [11] . ► Aching in gastric region, extending, in a sort of vibratory motion, towards the left nipple, [8] . ► Boring and tearing pain in the region of the stomach, extending up to the first lumbar vertebræ, [1] . ► Pressure at the stomach, [1] . ► Pressure at the stomach, with nausea and sensitiveness at the pit of the stomach, [1] . ► Pressure at the stomach, after dinner, [1] . ► Pressure at the stomach, at night , [1] . ► Oppression at the stomach, with a sensation of contraction (also in the chest), accompanied by loathing and nausea (fourth day), [3] . [420.] ► Oppression at the stomach, already early in the morning, passing into nausea and inclination to vomit, [1] . ► Oppression of the stomach after eating , [1] . ► Oppression at the stomach after supper (after twelve hours), [1] . ► Gnawing at the right side of the stomach, [1] . ► *Painfulness of the stomach when pressed upon (fourth day), [3] . ► Feeling of warmth in the scrobiculus cordis, [11] . ► After eating, great pressure at the pit of the stomach, succeeded by nausea und vomiting of the ingesta; afterwards, sour taste in the mouth; for five days (after sixteen days), [1] . ► Heaviness at the pit of the stomach, [1] .

abdomen.text: ABDOMEN. ► Pressive pain under the right ribs, in the region of the liver, [1] . ► Sore pain in the liver, [1] . [430.] ► Stitches below the left ribs in the evening, [3] . ► Pressure over the umbilicus, as from a button, [1] . ► Painful compression on both sides of the abdomen, only when sitting, relieved by motion and by stretching out (fifth day), [3] . ► Abdomen painfully distended, [12] . ► Excessively distended abdomen, [1] . ► Distension of the abdomen, with retention of stool, [3] . ► Rumbling in the abdomen, as from spasms, or when fasting, every time after she swallows something, for several days (after sixteenth day), [3] . ► Rumbling and pain in the bowels, [7] . ► Rumbling and moving, as from flatulence, in the abdomen, [3] . ► In afternoon, much rumbling of bowels and discharge of flatus, [15] . [440.] ► Much flatus, [14] . ► Much emission of flatulence, [1] . ► In evening, much flatus , [13] . ► Accumulation of flatulence, with griping, [3] . ► Emission of a quantity of flatulence in the afternoon, evening, and at night, the evacuations being normal (fourth day), [3] . ► The flatus very fetid, [18] . ► Contractive and pinching pain in the abdomen, first in the upper, then in the lower part, early in the morning, so violent that it produced qualmishness and gathering of water in the mouth, even unto faintness, accompanied by chilliness, twelve hours before the appearance of the menses (after nine days), [1] . ► Violent pinching, contraction, and rumbling in the belly, in the forenoon; it comes on when walking in the open air, and can only be relieved by lying upon the belly and applying warm cloths to it; in the evening it appears again, also in the cold on the following morning; afterwards, it becomes less when in the room (seventeenth day), [3] . ► Pinching and obstruction in the abdomen, [1] . ► Sudden painful contraction of the bowels, as far as the region of the stomach, relieved by compressing the belly with the hands, passing off after lying down (thirty-third day), [3] . [450.] ► Heaviness in the abdomen, [1] . ► Bellyache after breakfast (in one hour), [15] . ► Disposition to painful flatulent colic, [1] . ► At 3 o'clock in the morning, she is roused from her sleep by a violent colic, two days before the appearance of the menses (forty-first day), [3] . ► Violent colic at 7 o'clock in the morning (after forty-eight hours), [1] . ► Colic in the left side of the abdomen during dinner; the pain terminates with the emission of flatulence, [3] . ► Violent colic, two nights in succession, which did not diminish till after the passage of some strong flatulence, [1] . ► Cutting and biting in the bowels, as from worms, with contractive pain at the stomach, and chilliness and sweat; the person cannot fall asleep till morning; on waking up, the pain reappears, [3] . ► Stitches in the abdomen, which make walking difficult, [1] . ► Burning deep in the left side of the abdomen (second day), [3] . [460.] ► Pressive pain in the left side of the abdomen, early in the morning (after twelve hours), [1] . ► Stitches in the left side of the abdomen, in the evening, when stooping, [1] . ► Wet and cold, for several afternoons past, have caused pain in the bowels, [15] . ► The abdominal complaints recur regularly every evening, [15] . ► Pain in the abdomen, as if diarrha was coming on (in a quarter of an hour), [15] . ► Contractive cramp deep in the hypogastrium on stooping, also in the small of the back (thirty-eighth day), [1] . ► Pressure in the hypogastrium for three hours, also during dinner (after two hours), [1] . ► Transverse stitches deep in the hypogastrium, when standing, [1] . ► Cutting pain in the lower abdomen, during which the belly is very small (sixteenth day), [3] . ► Painful pressure in the groin and the bend of the thigh, [1] . [470.] ► (Pinching and) sharp stitches in the right groin, when stretching out (twentieth day), [3] . ► Elastic swelling in the left groin, as large as a fist, in the evening, after lying down, with a pain, as from a bruise, at that place ; on account of this pain she cannot rest upon that side; the pain is also experienced upon the parts being touched; on waking, swelling and pain had disappeared (ninth day), [3] . ► A hernia protrudes in the left groin (second day), [1] . ► Aching swelling of left inguinal glands, which went off towards noon, and was replaced by headache and ill-feeling, which lasted till evening, and recurred slightly next day, [9] . ► Sense of fulness and distension in the region of the left groin, [1] .

rectum.text: STOOL AND ANUS. ► The varices of the rectum protrude a good deal during the evacuation, and are painful a long time afterwards, so that she finds it impossible to walk (seventh day), [1] . ► The varices of the rectum protrude even when there is no evacuation, but they recede when lying down, [1] . ► Formation of varices of the rectum, moist, and with a pain as from excoriation, [1] . ► At night he cannot sleep, on account of a burning pain at the rectum; this, together with a strong desire for stool, compelled him to rise, [1] . ► After the evacuation, sense of scratching, then burning, at the anus, [1] . [480.] ► Itching of the anus , [1] . ► The child becomes sore between the legs, [1] . ► Diarrha, of fæces and mucus, with cutting in the abdomen, before and during the stools (eighth day), [3] . ► Diarrha, with colic, early in the morning, [7] . ► Loose stools, twice a day (third and fourth days), [7] , [3] . ► Loose motion, [15] . ► Loose stool, preceded and followed by cutting in abdomen , [1] . ► Uncommonly early call to stool, and loose evacuation, then headache and much rigor (in one-quarter hour), [15] . ► Liquid stool (8 A.M.), [8] . ► Stools mixed with mucus, [1] . [490.] ► At 7 A.M., evacuation surrounded by watery mucus. ► In morning early, a fecal evacuation, which, contrary to custom, occurred during the day, [15] . ► Evacuations, with constant tenesmus, [1] . ► Violent cutting in the rectum, with good evacuations, [1] . ► The evacuations are accompanied by a pinching pain in the abdomen , which moves transversely across the abdomen towards the sacrum and rectum; it is diminished by bending the body, and ceases entirely after an evacuation (twenty-eighth day), [6] . ► *Discharge of blood during and after the evacuation , [1] . ► Hard evacuation, followed by discharge of a milk-like prostatic fluid, [1] . ► Hard, painful stools, with pricking in the anus, [3] . ► Hard stools, surrounded with streaks of blood (after twenty-two hours), [1] . ► Retarded and hard stools , forming masses, which she finds it difficult to press out, [1] . [500.] ► Retention of stools during the first days; this is succeeded by loose stools (in all the provers), [3] . ► Constipation the first four days, [6] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Am-c.

respiratory.text: RESPIRATORY APPARATUS. ► Rattling in the larynx, as from mucus (for several days), [3] . ► Constriction of the larynx from both sides of the neck, [1] . [570.] ► Drawing, and stinging-itching in the larynx, [1] . ► Soon after, a catarrhal irritation in the nose, and scraping and scratching in the throat, with pain, as from excoriation, and difficult hawking up of a little phlegm (after half an hour), [2] . ► Hoarseness and roughness in the throat, [3] . ► Rough throat; he can only speak with difficulty, as speaking increases the roughness (second day), [1] . ► Violent and frequent hoarseness , [1] . ► She is so hoarse that she cannot speak a loud word (after sixteen days), [1] . ► His chest feels so oppressed that he can scarcely speak, with coryza, and expectoration, of much mucus, especially early in the morning, [1] . ► The chest feels rough; when calling aloud he is hoarse, [1] . ► Immediately after taking, an irritation, causing cough, which did not, however, last long, [19] . ► *Cough from a scratching in throat , [20] . [580.] ► *The child coughs violently every morning, at three to four o'clock , [1] . ► He is obliged to cough a quarter of an hour, when in bed in the evening, [1] . ► Nightly cough , [1] . ► At night, cough, with stuffed cold in the head, which kept him awake in bed from twelve to one o'clock, and yet, in the morning, felt quite well, except a little stomachache, which soon went off, but returned betwixt nine and ten o'clock, [16] . ► Cough, with asthma (sixth day), [3] . ► Cough, with asthma , for half an hour, in the evening when in bed, [1] . ► Cough, from deep in the chest, extremely violent, [1] . ► Cough, which contracts the chest, [1] . ► Cough, which makes the chest under the sternum feel sore, as from excoriation, [1] . ► Cough, exciting a pain in the jaws, which is not felt upon touching them, [1] . [590.] ► Cough, with pain at the lower part of the sternum, [1] . ► Cough, with stitches in the sternum (first day), [1] . ► Cough, every attack causes a stitch in the pit of the stomach, [1] . ► Cough, with heat in the head, [3] . ► Short and suppressed hacking, from an irritation in the larynx, with painful sensation of spasmodic asthma, [1] . ► *Dry cough, especially at night, as from particles of dust in the throat , [3] . ► *Violent dry cough in the middle of the night , [1] . ► Cough, with expectoration of phlegm, and soreness in the air-passages, [3] . ► Cough, during the whole day, and early in the morning, with expectoration of a quantity of phlegm, [1] . ► Continual cough, early in bed, with expectoration of phlegm, affecting chest and head, [1] . [600.] ► Cough, with expectoration of phlegm, intermixed with little points of blood (after eight days), [1] . ► *Cough, with expectoration of bloody phlegm , heaviness upon the chest, and short breath, especially in ascending a hill (sixth and eighteenth days), [3] . ► Increased expectoration, [20] . ► Bloody expectoration when clearing the throat, [1] . ► Roughness, and bloody taste in the mouth, succeeded by cough and expectoration of light-red blood, with burning and heaviness in the chest, heat and redness in the face, and trembling of the whole body (fourth day), [3] . ► Much hawking of saltish mucus at night, [1] . ► *Oppression of breathing , [17] . ► Difficult breathing; it made him hack (short cough), [1] . ► Difficult breathing at night; he cannot bear the cover of the bed to touch his mouth, for then he is afraid of choking (seventh day), [3] . ► Asthma and palpitation of the heart after every effort, [3] . [610.] ► Attack of asthma for eight days; he had immense trouble in ascending a few steps, and in breathing; this was only possible for him in the open air; he dared not venture into a warm room; he there turned as pale as a corpse, and was unable to do anything except sit still (after twenty-one days), [1] . ► Short breathing, with stitches in the chest, [3] . ► Short breathing, especially on going upstairs, [3] . ► When breathing, frequent stitches in the hands and fingers, [1] .

Hoarseness. Cough every morning about three o'clock, with dyspnœa, palpitation, burning in chest; worse ascending. Chest feels tired. Emphysema. Much oppression in breathing; worse after any effort, and entering warm room, or ascending even a few steps. Asthenic Pneumonia. Slow labored, stertorous breathing; bubbling sound. Winter catarrh, with slimy sputum and specks of blood. Pulmonary œdema

VOICE AND LARYNX. TRACHEA AND BRONCHIA. [25] [Am. c.]. Slight difficulty in speech ; incipient paralysis of laryngeal nerves. θ Softening of brain. Great dryness of throat and hoarseness. Hoarseness : with roughness in throat ; cannot speak a loud word ; < from speaking. Larynx as if drawn shut from both sides of throat. Rattling in larynx as from mucus. Accumulation of mucus in trachea. θ Softening of brain. Catarrh. Shortness of breath and palpitation after every exertion. Dyspnœa, with palpitation of heart. Great difficulty of breathing in going up even a few steps ; less in open air. Dares not come into a warm room, in which he becomes deathly pale and can do nothing but sit quiet. θ Asthma. Difficult breathing ; causing short cough. Oppression of breathing. Catarrh, dyspnœa, asthma. One of the best remedies in emphysema. Chronic asthma, tendency to hydrothorax. Œdema pulmonum with somnolence from poisoning of blood with carbonic acid. Dry cough at night with tickling in larynx, headache. Cough dry and worse at night, like from feather down in throat. Cough at night ; every morning, at 3 o'clock, dry cough from tickling in throat, as of dust. Cough : with spitting of blood, previous sweet taste and great dyspnœa, with stitches in small of back and pit of stomach ; short, asthmatic, from irritation in larynx, with painful sensation of spasmodic contraction of chest ; with asthma, evening in bed ; with hoarseness, body being warm ; with spitting of bloody phlegm, heaviness on chest, short breath, especially on ascending a hill. Coughs up dark blood. Roughness and bloody taste in mouth, succeeded by cough and sputum of light-red blood, with burning and heaviness in chest, face red and hot, body trembling. Much hawking of saltish mucus at night. Expectoration seldom ; or morning and during day. Sputa thin, foamy ; adynamic state, with rattling of large bubbles in chest. θ Bronchitis in the aged.

chest.text: CHEST. ► Red rash on the chest, [1] . ► Pain in the chest, [8] . ► Pains in the chest, [17] . ► During an expiration it seems as if something drew downwards in the chest, and did not permit expiration (seventh day), [3] . ► The chest feels weak, [1] . ► Chronic weakness of the chest and coryza (after fourth week), [3] . [620.] ► Heaviness on the chest , as from an accumulation of blood (fourth, fifth, seventh days), [3] . ► Heaviness and tightness of the chest, when walking in the open air, [3] . ► Painful oppression at the chest, as from a hundred-weight; she only desires to cough, in order to be relieved (seventh day), [1] . ► Painful oppression on the chest, especially when lying on the bed, [1] . ► Rush of blood to the chest (after writing), [1] . ► Heat in the chest, [1] . ► Compressive oppression on the chest, [1] . ► Contraction of the middle of the chest, either when breathing or not; the place aches on pressing upon it, as after a blow, [3] . ► Bruised pain in the middle of the chest, early in the morning (fourth day), [1] . ► When standing, sensation in the chest as if the lungs were drawn down (sixth day), [3] . [630.] ► Great distress in the chest, [1] . ► Stitches in the chest, at the last true rib, when breathing and singing, [1] . ► Stitches in the chest, when stooping, relieved by straightening up (sixteenth day), [3] . ► Stitches upon the sternum, in the right side of the chest and under the left breast; upon touching the parts they feel bruised, [3] . ► Stitches in the right side of the chest, when walking, [7] . ► Stitches in the right breast, when stooping, [1] . ► Twenty, thirty successive stitches, even when she does not breathe, under the right breast, close by the lowest ribs, early in the morning, when rising up in bed; likewise, at other periods of the day, [1] . ► The right breast is painful to the touch (third day), [1] . ► A small, red furunculus above the right breast, which is only painful when touched, [1] . ► Pain, especially in left side of chest, as after sitting long in a bent position, [8] . [640.] ► Felt an uninterrupted aching in chest, more on left than right side, [16] . ► Shooting at the side of the left nipple in breathing; especially troublesome when seated, [8] . ► Violent stitches in the left side of the chest, commencing in the præcordial region and then moving downwards towards the side, and afterwards towards the back (after eleven days), [1] . ► Stitches in the left breast, during a great portion of the night, which do not permit her lying on the left side, [1] . ► The parts of the sternum crack upon the chest being bent backward, with a pressure in the middle of the chest, [1] . ► Heaviness and oppression at the sternum, at night, [1] .

heart.text: HEART AND PULSE. ► Great palpitation, [8] . ► Frequent palpitation of the heart, with retraction of the epigastrium and sense of weakness in the præcordial region, [1] . ► Audible palpitation of the heart and accelerated beating; upon the hand being pressed upon the heart the blood seems to rise to the neck, with breathing rendered difficult (at rest), [1] . ► Pulse somewhat quickened, [14] . [650.] ► Pulse seems to get quicker whenever the oppression came on, [7] . ► Pulse about half as strong again as usual, [8] . ► Pulse 112, [12] . ► Pulse 76, [12] .

back.text: NECK AND BACK. ► Violent burning in the nape of the neck, early in the morning (tenth day), [3] . ► Drawing pain at the nape of the neck (with stitches at the head, over the temples, and bloated face), [1] . ► Drawing from the neck down (sixth day), [3] . ► Stiff neck, when turning the head, [1] . ► Pain in the back, during motion, [7] . ► Burning at the back, especially in the small of the back, several times during the day, [1] . [660.] ► Pressure in the back, [1] . ► A jerk in the back, at night, when asleep (seventh day), [3] . ► A blister forms upon the left scapula, with a sensation of stinging, as from fleas, [3] . ► Pain in the small of the back, increased by motion and walking, [1] . ► Pain in the small of the back when stooping; she feels as if the muscles were not strong enough to support the body, which constantly threatens to fall forwards; relieved by straightening up (second day), [3] . ► Pain in the small of the back, as from a bruise (second day of the menses), [3] . ► Upon walking out into the open air he had a sudden dart into the small of the back; this was most painful when rising, after being seated for a long time, [1] . ► Shooting pain in the small of the back, [1] . ► Drawing pain from the small of the back to the legs, [1] . ► Drawing and pressive pain in the small of the back and in the loin, only when at rest (sitting, standing, or lying), in daytime; it disappears when walking, [1] . [670.] ► Violently throbbing pain in the small of the back and in the loin, when at rest; upon touching the parts the pain remains the same, [1] . ► Gnawing pain in the small of the back and in the hips; from these parts it extends to the abdomen, and moves again backwards, both when at rest and in motion (sixteenth day), [1] . ► Stinging at the coccyx preceded by itching, [1] .

Pains in the lumbar region, and pains in the nape of the neck, mostly of a dragging nature. Acute draggings from the side to the scapulary joint. Painful swelling of the glands of the neck and of the axillary glands. Goître. Drawing tension in the back and in the loins.

Burning on throat externally. Lymphatic glands swollen. θ Scarlatina. (OBS :) Goitre. Pain in nape of neck. Pain between scapulæ. Violent pain in small of back, with great coldness. θ Amenorrhœa. Pressive drawing pain in small of back and loins, only when at rest, during day ; passing off when walking. Stitches at coccyx, where before there was itching.

extremities.text: EXTREMITIES IN GENERAL. ► All her limbs ache in the forenoon and at night, with gnawing pain in the small of the back, more when at rest than when moving about (forty-first day), [3] . ► Sensation as if the limbs were bruised; also in the evening, [1] . ► Bruised feeling in limbs, [8] . ► All her limbs pain her at night, with gnawing pain in the small of the back (forty-first day), [3] . ► Great lassitude in limbs as after a fever, [8] . ► Great lassitude in her limbs and complete disinclination to work, [1] . ► Morning after taking, great lassitude in all the limbs, as if he had not slept enough, [15] . [680.] ► Great fatigue and weakness of the limbs, especially in the evening hours, in the knees and legs, so that he is obliged to lie down (first and second days), [2] . ► Itching in all the limbs, [10] . ► Cracking in the joints, when walking, [1] . ► Sticking drawing, sometimes in the right arm, sometimes in the legs, [1] . ► The hands and feet go to sleep when sitting; passes off on moving about, [3] . ► Cold hands and feet, even in a warm room, and when they are well covered, [1] . UPPER EXTREMITIES. ► Drawing pain in the arms and hands, [1] . ► Tearing in the joints of the upper extremities, [1] . ► Tearing in the shoulders, [3] . ► Drawing pain in the right shoulder-joint (after fourteenth day), [1] . [690.] ► Shooting and tearing in the right shoulder-joint, both when at rest and in motion (thirty-seventh day), [3] . ► Small furunculus upon the left shoulder, [3] . ► Pressure upon the left shoulder, [1] . ► A few tearings in the left shoulder towards the chest, [3] . ► Bruised pain in the left shoulder, when at rest and in motion, [3] . ► Bruised pain in the left shoulder and elbow-joint (in the evening), [1] . ► The glands in the axilla become painful and enlarged, [1] . ► Drawing pain in the arms and hands, [1] . ► Noticed on upper arm, where he had received a prick, a kind of insensibility, which only went off gradually, [16] . ► Burning at a small spot of the upper and lower arm (eleventh day), [3] . [700.] ► In the night, about three or four o'clock, she puts her arm out of bed without knowing it; the pain which she experiences in her arm rouses her from sleep; the arm is cold, stiff, and in the elbow-joint it is as heavy as lead; the arm being very stiff, she has to use the other hand, in order to put the arm back again into the bed, upon moving it, or when the arm is in the bed, a tearing pain in the shoulder, elbow, and wrist-joint, [1] . ► Spasm in the right arm, which drew the arm backwards , three times in succession; this was succeeded by heat of the body and turbid, white urine, [1] . ► Twitches and jerkings in the right upper arm (fourth day), [3] . ► Sensation of paralysis of the right arm (fourteenth day), [8] . ► Heaviness and sensation of paralysis of the right arm; she has no strength in it, and is obliged to let it hang down; at the same time the hand is swollen and cold for half an hour (after two hours), [1] . ► The right arm appeared to weigh a hundredweight, and to be without strength , [1] . ► For some days the right arm is quite weak and cold, so that it appears to be benumbed and lifeless; this was again succeeded by a tingling sensation in it, [1] . ► Paralytic drawing in the left arm, extending from the axilla as far as the wrist, [1] . ► Cracking in the elbow-joint, during motion, [1] . ► Creaking pain in elbow-joint, on stretching the arm out straight before him, [1] . [710.] ► Stiffness of the elbow-joint, [1] . ► Boring pain in the elbow-joint, in the fossa which receives the olecranon process, [1] . ► Sharp stitches in the elbow, [1] . ► Tearing in the elbow (in the bone) as far as the little finger (fourth and fifth days), [3] . ► Violent pain in the middle of the left forearm, in the evening, when in bed, with a sensation as if the bone there would curve inward and break (second day), [3] . ► Itching of the inside of the right forearm, with a sensation as of burning consequent upon scratching; at the same time there are formed small red pimples, spots, and nodes, which do not cease to itch after being scratched; on the day following they become crimson (fourth and fifth days), [3] . ► Tension in the wrist-joint, when at rest, worse during motion; he feels as if he could not move his hand (second day), [3] . ► Tearing in the wrist-joints as far as the fingers; it ceases when she is warm in bed, [1] . ► Painful tearing in the left wrist, as if in the marrow towards the little finger (sixth day), [3] . ► The right hand frequently goes to sleep when lying upon it during the night (fourth day), [3] .
